commands.command: DOPPLER_TOKEN=$DOPPLER_JOURNEYS_TOKEN doppler secrets download --no-file --format=env-no-quotes --project journeys --config ${DOPPLER_CONFIG:-dev} | grep -E '^(LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY|LANGFUSE_SECRET_KEY|LANGFUSE_BASE_URL|OPENROUTER_API_KEY|OPENROUTER_MODEL|APOLOGIST_API_URL|APOLOGIST_API_KEY|APOLOGIST_MODEL_ID|GOOGLE_GENERATIVE_AI_API_KEY)=' > libs/llm-evals/.env
